name: Luminescence Technology Corp.
summary: Luminescence Technology Corp. manufactures and sells organic chemicals in North America, Europe, Asia, and Taiwan. Its product-range includes organic light emitting diode (OLED) material, OPV material, OTFT material, organic intermediates, boronic acid, and ITO patterned glass and components. The company offers patented materials, biomedical science, organic light emitting diode (OLED), thermally activated delayed fluorescence OLED, solution-processed OLED, organic photovoltaic, dye-sensitized solar cell, perovskite solar cells, organic thin-film transistor, flexible printed electronics, photonic and optical device, synthetic intermediates and reagents, and electrode/substrate and sealing. It offers organic optoelectronic materials in the markets of OLED, OPV, and OTFT have led luminescence technology. Luminescence Technology Corp. is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
